primary_test: Does Kibitz correctly classify 23...Qg3!! as brilliant and explain why every capture loses (overloaded defenses), not just call it 'a strong queen move'?

must_flag_moves.note: 23...Qg3!! — Black's 23rd move (2*23=46). The legendary queen sacrifice: if hxg3 Ne2#; if fxg3 Ne2+ wins queen; if Qxg3 Ne2+ forks. White resigned.

forbidden_claims: White can capture the queen safely
the position is unclear after Qg3
